content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with Huang Zu for a long time, and he also knew a lot of secrets.

These secrets, ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlords are not qualified to know, but Ye Tian's strength is stronger than that of the Desolate Ancestor, and the Desolate Ancestor naturally does not dare to hide it.

After a long time, Ye Tian left the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

Moreover, in the end, the Desolate Ancestor also revealed a piece of news, that is, the rules left by the Origin Ancestor could not permanently protect the land of the Eternal Shore.

In the future, the rules left by the Origin Ancestor will eventually dissipate.

At that time, the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan can enter the land of eternity, and the Reincarnation Golden Worms can also enter.

Therefore, the Desolate Ancestors all wanted to break through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm of the Ninth Awakening, in that case, they would have the power to protect themselves.

If a few more Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Ninth Awakening were born, they could also join forces to protect one side and not become their slaves of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

......

"According to the Desolate Clan, there is also a Reincarnation Tribe, in addition to the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan, the Reincarnation Tribe, the Reincarnation Tribe, is the weakest of the three reincarnation clans, the number is very rare, but it should not be underestimated!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The physical body of the reincarnation clan is very weak, and what they cultivate is the will of the Origin Realm, their talent in the will of the Origin Realm is very high, and they can easily raise the will of the Origin Realm, and they also take the path of integrating into the origin of the reincarnation domain and become the origin Dao ancestor.

Therefore, the reincarnation clan is almost an immortal and immortal existence, and can only seal them, but cannot kill them.

Of course.

The Wild Ancestor didn't know much about it.

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

Ye Tian inquired about the information about the reincarnation clan, and he really found it.

Compared with the Desolate Ancestor, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan naturally knows more about the Reincarnation Clan.

Soon.

Ye Tian knew a lot of information about the reincarnation clan.

The number of reincarnation tribes is extremely rare, there are hundreds of thousands of people, and it is extremely difficult to reproduce, but the reincarnation tribes are also hundreds of thousands of origin and upper realm overlords.

This amount is terrifying for the land of eternity, and it is only a small number compared to the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan.

Besides, hundreds of thousands of immortal and immortal Origin Upper Realm Overlords, how terrifying this is!

In fact, the reincarnation celestial clan is also extremely jealous of the reincarnation clan and is unwilling to provoke the reincarnation clan.

After all, if you fight with the reincarnation clan, if the members of the reincarnation celestial clan fall, then they will really fall, but the members of the reincarnation clan will not fall, destroy their bodies, and still recover.

And in the middle of the battle, it is not easy to seal the members of the reincarnation clan.

The only fortunate thing is that the Origin Dao Ancestor of the Reincarnation Clan who broke the boundary of the will of the nine times is very rare, so he was suppressed by the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

And for countless years, many members of the reincarnation tribe have been sealed in the reincarnation dark domain, which has greatly reduced the strength of the reincarnation tribe.

"Compared with the three reincarnation races in the land of eternity, there is no qualification for confrontation at all, and even in terms of the number of overlords in the Origin Upper Realm, it is not as good as the top slave race!"

Those slave races just don't have powerful Origin Upper Realm Overlords, but there are quite a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

The reason why the Reincarnation Domain was able to give birth to so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords was because there were too many resources that could help the cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm, and they could also use those resources to easily cultivate the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side.

Otherwise, how could that group of slaves have so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords!

"Those low-end resources, I also have to collect them, so that the Tianshan Pavilion can cultivate more Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and it can also allow the human race to give birth to a large number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords!" Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, over the years, he has also supplied a lot of resources, like the Lord of the Wind Fang, the Lord of Ice and Rain, and the Lord of the White Capital, all of them have all reached the peak realm of the Origin Upper Realm with the help of Ye Tian, and they are all cultivating the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

It won't be long before the Origin Origin Upper Realm will successfully practice the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side and break through to become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

......

Tianshan Pavilion, inside a palace.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth is cultivating a Origin Ancestral Body Method on the Other Side, and the Origin Ancestral Body Method he cultivates on the Other Shore is not very powerful, but it is also suitable for him, it is a Origin Ancestral Body Method on the Other Shore called the Fog Black Hurricane Method.

This kind of Origin Method on the other side requires a lot of rare materials, and if he relies on himself, he is afraid that he does not know how many years it will take to collect it, and he may not even be able to collect it permanently.

However, the Tianshan Pavilion directly provided these resources.

"The Lord of Infinity is really powerful, I can't collect a few of these rare resources, but he can easily provide so many!" said the Lord of Wind Fang.

He was also glad that Wind Tooth Island had received the Endless Lord, otherwise how could there be a good thing today!

After exchanging these materials, he began to cultivate the Fog Black Hurricane Method.

Time passes slowly.

Soon, he failed in his cultivation.

It's normal to fail in your first cultivation.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth also inquired about a lot of information about the Origin Upper Realm Impacting the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and almost none of them succeeded in cultivating for the first time.

For example, the Lord of the Cold Star has cultivated several times, but he still hasn't broken through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord realm.

"If it's another Origin Realm, if you fail to cultivate once, you have to rely on a long time to slowly collect materials, but I don't need to!"

He exchanged a batch of materials from Tianshan Pavilion, these materials are extremely precious, he naturally does not have enough wealth and contribution value to exchange, but he can owe it and repay it slowly in the future, which is also the rule set by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth began his second cultivation, but failed again the second time.

So, for the third time, for the fourth time......

It can be said that the Lord of Wind Fang has consumed a lot of resources and materials, even the Ancient Heavenly Palace can't easily come up with so many materials, but Ye Tian doesn't care at all.

These resources, and they are all low-grade resources, to him, they are just a bunch of weeds, and he doesn't care at all.

Seventh.

The Lord of the Wind Teeth finally cultivated the Misty Black Hurricane Ancestral Body and successfully stepped into the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm.

"Hahahaha, I don't know how many billions of primeval epochs, I finally broke through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm!!"

The Lord of the Wind Teeth was extremely excited, and the aura that belonged to the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm permeated.

Moreover, when he broke through, the visions were repeated, and he had already attracted the attention of the outside world, and the others naturally knew that the Lord of the Wind Fangs had broken through.
